_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of change management policies and procedures
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-scale data and AI transformation programs, including adoption barriers, culture change levers, and executive sponsorship requirements.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI LS domain. Knowledge LS-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-003 (OP, cosine: 0.659), DQ-K-009 (DQ, cosine: 0.536).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.612). Shared vocabulary: [change, knowledge, management]. NICE-only terms [policies, procedures] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, ai, applied, barriers, culture, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.904 (P=0.936, R=0.875). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of change management policies and procedures" and "Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-sca" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.694 > STS 0.612 (gap +0.082). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [change, knowledge, management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 19.2%. Shared tokens: [change, knowledge, management]. NICE-only: [policies, procedures]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, ai, applied, barriers, culture, data].
